Songs written in the dark places,
because that's where faith does its deepest work.

Discography
About

Parsons Cross

Parsons Cross is a Contemporary Christian worship band rooted in honest faith — the kind that doesn't flinch from doubt, grief, or the long stretches where the answers don't come easy.

Their music starts in the valley and points toward the light. Not because the hard parts get edited out, but because they've found that the hard parts are exactly where grace tends to show up.

Released through Hello Texas Records, their debut album Out of the Darkness walks through six songs of struggle, surrender, and hard-won hope. The follow-up, Into the Light, is underway — songs written on the other side of the valley, still honest, now hopeful.

Debut Album

Out of the Darkness

Parsons Cross

Six songs written in the valley. Honest worship for the nights when faith feels like a faint light at the end of a very long road.
